shots.prompt: An endless hall of glowing morphing doors, each opening onto a different breathing fractal universe, kaleidoscopic and recursive, neon light pouring through. Hypnotic, seamless, vivid.
Camera flies through door after door, each world melting into the next, liquid geometry and bioluminescent color folding origami-like in continuous motion. Mesmerizing, fluid.
All the doors merge into a single colossal mandala that rotates and breathes, infinite recursive symmetry blooming outward in hyper-saturated color. Dreamlike, satisfying.
The mandala opens into a calm tunnel of soft radiant light, the journey dissolving gently into pure breathing color and stillness. Serene, smooth, infinite.
